training_status: Exercises a lot; 10% body fat at start

benefits.description: Lost 10lbs in 2 weeks, though noted a lot was muscle loss

side_effects.description: Barely ate at 2.5mg/week, too much appetite suppression

protocol_notes: 6'1", 215lbs, 10% BF. Started at 0.5mg, went to 1mg, then 2.5mg which was too much. Dialed back to 1.25mg which was still too much due to good eating habits. Goal is to reach 5-6% BF while staying over 200lbs. Purchased 300mg for ~$500, 3rd party tested. Based in the US. Girlfriend also on same protocol: 47yo, 5'9", started at 163lbs/28% BF, reached 151lbs/26% BF in two weeks starting at 0.5mg.
